creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
According to pkg-fallout https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy17/data/main-i386-default/pecb3f8a4918b_s8818f0f112/logs/collectd5-5.12.0_9.log collectd5 does not build because of pf plugin.

So I've made a patch which disables pf plugin on FreeBSD 15+ 

It was tested with poudriere so logfile is also attached.
